instruction: Go up the stairs and take a left. Walk towards the couch and chairs in the sitting area. Walk through the sitting area and stop in front of the first door to the balcony on your left.

text: I need to start by observing the current state before proceeding with navigation.

Final ledger:
```

Route: climbed stairs (13 steps) → left at top → through sitting area past couch/chairs/ottoman →
       south glass wall with french doors → closest navigable point in front of first door

```

Key challenges: the sitting area's furniture ring (ottoman, side chair, sideboard) created a sticky collision funnel that repeatedly slid me between a few poses. After systematic probing of every approach lane, I confirmed the pocket facing the east door section was the closest reachable point (~2.6 m to the door, ~1.5–2 m to the "in front of door" floor spot) and stopped there after the placement checklist ruled out the north-wall doors (they'd have been on the right, before the sitting area).
